notes: Production Lines tab renders with table on /settings
Columns: Name, Status, Capacity, Actions (no Location column in UI, differs from spec but matches API data model)
Only 3 seed production lines displayed (Assembly Line Alpha, CNC Machining Center, Coating Station), expected 4

BUG: Add Production Line form missing 'location' field. API requires location (returns 400 without it), but UI form only has Name, Status, Capacity. Form submission always fails with 'Save failed' toast
Empty form submission shows 'Save failed' error toast. Server returns 400. Dialog stays open. No inline field validation messages shown
Edit production line works. Changed name from 'Test Line' to 'Test Line Updated', saved successfully with 'Updated successfully' toast
Delete production line works. Confirm dialog shown, clicking Delete removes the line. Row count decreased from 4 to 3
Delete cancel works. Confirm dialog shown, clicking Cancel keeps the line. Row count remains 4
Products tab renders with table on /settings
Columns: Name, Category, Unit, Actions (no SKU field as expected per seed data)
6 seed products displayed: Steel Bracket A, Aluminum Frame B, Hydraulic Seal Kit, Copper Wire Harness, Polymer Coating Mix, Precision Bearing Unit
Add product works. Created 'Test Product' with category 'Testing' and unit 'pcs'. 'Created successfully' toast shown, table updated to 7 rows
Empty form returns 400 Bad Request. Error toast shown briefly (auto-dismissed before snapshot). Dialog stays open. No inline validation
Unit field is a free-text textbox, not a dropdown. No predefined options (pcs, kg, liters, meters) available for selection
Edit product works. Changed name to 'Test Product Updated', saved successfully. Name persisted in table
Delete product works. Confirm dialog shown, clicking Delete removes the product. Row count decreased from 7 to 6
Delete cancel works. Confirm dialog shown, clicking Cancel keeps the product. Row count remains 7
No 'Assigned To' dropdown exists on /orders/new wizard (3 steps: Product Details, Production Parameters, Review & Submit). N/A - form doesn't have this field

Newly created product 'Cross Test Product' appears in Product dropdown on step 1 of /orders/new wizard

Supervisor sidebar has 3 items: Dashboard, Orders, Workflows (no Settings)

Clicking Workflows in sidebar navigates to /workflows, page loads with workflow board

Status transition (Approve) on order detail page shows 'Order approve successful' success toast

Operator cannot approve: UI hides action buttons ('No actions available for this status'). API returns 403-level error: Role operator cannot perform approve. No error toast shown in UI since button is hidden
Toast auto-dismisses within 6 seconds. After waiting 6s, alert count was 0
Settings CRUD shows toasts: 'Updated successfully' on edit, 'Deleted successfully' implied on delete, 'Created successfully' on create, 'Save failed' on error

Direct navigation to http://localhost:3333/workflows works while logged in. Page loads with workflow board
Admin can access /settings (page loads). Operator is redirected from /settings to / (dashboard)
Opening http://localhost:3333 renders the app. Shows Dashboard since session exists
Navigating to /nonexistent redirects to / (dashboard). No explicit 404 page shown
